data.body: STATUS (handoff): OPEN, NOT claimed. Plan needs a MECHANISM REWRITE — the gate correctly refuted my API claims: (1) resolve.extract_references_from_diff extracts IMPORTS only (Python), NOT symbol definitions; (2) code-review DET detectors are Engine B grounding rules (gitleaks/opengrep patterns) selected by exec:DET routing 'detector' selectors, so a 'symbol-added-without-a-test' check (diff-parse added public defs + cross-file test correlation) does NOT fit that pattern model and needs a BESPOKE seam in the code-review pipeline; (3) code_review routing has NO 'priority' field and a new criterion id must be added to OVERLAY_IDS. RECOMMENDATION for next session: split — scope THIS child to the FEASIBLE nit down-rank (code_review/criteria_routing.json: mark docs + llm-prompts non-blocking / suppressed) with a routing test, and create a discovered_from follow-up ticket for the bespoke new-behavior-without-test detector (it is genuinely larger than the ticket implies). Alternatively design the bespoke detector seam. This child is INDEPENDENT of the stack code, so its plan-review can ground against origin/main (no REBAR_GATE_REF needed).
